patches.hypothesis: The refined patch addresses the overfitting issue by handling non-fininte double values more robustly, adding more test cases to cover edge cases, and using a more general approach to handle different types of inputs.
patches.changes:
- Refactor method to use a more robust approach to handle non-finite double values
- Add more test cases to cover edge cases
- Modify logic to handle different types of inputs
patches.diff:
- Refactor method to use a more robust approach to handle non-finite double values

patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the method throwing an IllegalArgumentException when it encounters a non-finite double value, even when the lenient flag is set to true. The test is expecting the method to output the string representation of the value when the lenient flag is set to true.
